compiled_state.title: test-suite: 45 tests exceed 5s duration threshold -> cumulative ~470s slow-test overhead
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Bug Report

### Summary
45 of 264 tests (17%) exceed 5 seconds, with the slowest taking 33s. Cumulative slow-test time is ~470s, which is the primary driver of the test-batched.sh multi-pass problem (264 tests cannot complete in a single 50s window).

### Evidence (measured 2026-04-12)

| Duration | Test |
|----------|------|
| 33.3s | test-validate-nava-platform-headless.sh |
| 28.5s | test-test-batched.sh |
| 26.9s | test-ticket-transition.sh |
| 24.9s | test-dso-setup.sh |
| 19.5s | test-ticket-link.sh |
| 16.6s | test-validate-skip-ci-flag.sh |
| 15.3s | test-retro-gather-suggestions.sh |
| 13.9s | test-ticket-create.sh |
| 13.0s | test-ticket-archive-eligibility.sh |
| 12.8s | test-retro-gather.sh |
| 12.8s | test-ticket-list.sh |
| 11.5s | test-ticket-lib.sh |
| 11.3s | test-sprint-next-batch.sh |
| 10.6s | test-validate-build-step.sh |
| 10.5s | test-validate-script-writes-integration.sh |
| 10.4s | test-ticket-edit.sh |
| 10.0s | test-validate-issues.sh |
| 9.7s | test-sprint-list-epics.sh |
| 9.5s | test-run-all.sh |
| 9.5s | test-ticket-dependency-e2e.sh |
| 8.8s | test-flat-config-e2e.sh |
| 8.8s | test-pre-commit-wrapper.sh |
| 8.7s | test-merge-to-main-locking.sh |
| 8.5s | test-merge-to-main-cleanliness.sh |
| 8.3s | test-bug-report-cli-validation.sh |
| 7.9s | test-merge-to-main-auto-resolve.sh |
| 7.7s | test-sprint-drift-check.sh |
| 7.4s | test-ticket-lifecycle.sh |
| 7.2s | test-suggestion-record.sh |
| 7.2s | test-ticket-archived-exclusion-e2e.sh |
| 7.1s | test-ticket-deps.sh |
| 6.9s | test-ticket-list-transition-comment-e2e.sh |
| 6.4s | test-ticket-e2e.sh |
| 6.2s | test-project-detect.sh |
| 6.2s | test-validate-sigurg-handler.sh |
| 6.1s | test-ticket-compact.sh |
| 5.9s | test-ticket-show.sh |
| 5.7s | test-emit-review-event.sh |
| 5.7s | test-ticket-init.sh |
| 5.6s | test-isolation-check.sh |
| 5.5s | test-ticket-comment.sh |
| 5.5s | test-validate-e2e-missing-target.sh |
| 5.4s | test-cleanup-claude-session.sh |
| 5.4s | test-compact-sync-precondition.sh |
| 5.1s | test-validate-shim-refs-integration.sh |

### Patterns Observed
1. **Ticket tests dominate**: 18 of 45 slow tests are ticket-related. Each test creates a fresh git repo + ticket system init, which involves multiple git commits. Shared fixture or pre-built repo template could eliminate repeated init cost.
2. **Validation tests**: Several validation tests (nava-platform-headless, build-step, skip-ci-flag) run validate.sh or similar heavy operations.
3. **Meta-test overhead**: test-test-batched.sh (28.5s) tests the test runner itself with intentional sleeps and timeouts.
4. **Git-heavy setup**: merge-to-main tests, sprint tests, and drift-check tests all create multi-commit git repos per test case.

### Expected Behavior
Individual tests should complete in under 5 seconds. Tests requiring expensive setup should share fixtures or use pre-built templates.

### Actual Behavior
45 tests exceed 5s, with 6 tests exceeding 15s each.

### Reproduction
Run: `for f in tests/scripts/test-*.sh; do start=$(python3 -c "import time; print(time.time())"); bash "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; end=$(python3 -c "import time; print(time.time())"); python3 -c "d=$end-$start; print(f'{d:6.1f}s  {\"$(basename $f)\"}') if d > 5 else None"; done`

comments.body:
## Progress Update (2026-04-12 session)

### Tests Improved

| Test | Before | After | Fix Applied |
|------|--------|-------|-------------|
| test-validate-nava-platform-headless.sh | 33.3s | 4.4s | FD-leak: redirect to file instead of $(), reduce stub sleep 30→2 |
| test-dso-setup.sh | 24.9s | 12.3s | No-op pre-commit stub on PATH eliminates 0.35s×59 install overhead |
| test-validate-skip-ci-flag.sh | 16.6s | 3.5s | VALIDATE_SKIP_PLUGIN_CHECKS=1 skips unrelated plugin checks |
| test-retro-gather-suggestions.sh | 15.3s | 6.3s | Kill timer 5s→2s (output appears within 1s) |
| test-retro-gather.sh | 12.8s | 4.3s | Kill timer 10s→2s (output appears within 1s) |
| test-test-batched.sh | 28.5s | ~29s | FD-leak fixed (5 sites); runtime dominated by 68 subprocess invocations |
| test-ticket-transition.sh | 26.9s | 25.3s | clone_ticket_repo eliminates per-test ticket init |
| 19 other ticket tests | various | -0.2s each | clone_ticket_repo fixture (cumulative ~4s) |

### Tests NOT YET Addressed (remaining >5s)

| Duration | Test | Bottleneck |
|----------|------|------------|
| ~29s | test-test-batched.sh | 68 subprocess invocations (irreducible without test restructuring) |
| ~25s | test-ticket-transition.sh | 50+ ticket CLI calls at ~0.4s each (needs epic 78fc-3858: sourceable ticket-lib) |
| ~19s | test-ticket-link.sh | 60+ ticket CLI calls (needs 78fc-3858) |
| ~14s | test-ticket-create.sh | 17 repo clones + ticket creates (needs 78fc-3858) |
| ~13s | test-ticket-archive-eligibility.sh | ticket CLI overhead (needs 78fc-3858) |
| ~12s | test-ticket-list.sh | ticket CLI overhead (needs 78fc-3858) |
| ~12s | test-ticket-lib.sh | ticket CLI overhead (needs 78fc-3858) |
| ~11s | test-sprint-next-batch.sh | 29 test cases with ticket CLI setup |
| ~10s | test-validate-build-step.sh | runs validate.sh twice (full plugin checks) |
| ~10s | test-validate-script-writes-integration.sh | runs validate.sh |
| ~10s | test-ticket-edit.sh | ticket CLI overhead (needs 78fc-3858) |
| ~10s | test-validate-issues.sh | ticket fixture setup + python validation |
| ~10s | test-sprint-list-epics.sh | complex git/ticket fixture setup |
| ~10s | test-run-all.sh | sentinel process management with sleeps |
| ~10s | test-ticket-dependency-e2e.sh | ticket CLI overhead (needs 78fc-3858) |
| ~9s | test-flat-config-e2e.sh | runs validate.sh |
| ~9s | test-pre-commit-wrapper.sh | intentional sleep 2 in 6 timeout tests |
| ~9s | test-merge-to-main-locking.sh | git repo setup + merge operations |
| ~9s | test-merge-to-main-cleanliness.sh | git repo setup + merge operations |
| ~8s | test-bug-report-cli-validation.sh | pre-existing test failure |
| ~8s | test-merge-to-main-auto-resolve.sh | git repo setup + merge operations |
| ~8s | test-sprint-drift-check.sh | ticket CLI overhead |
| ~7s | test-ticket-lifecycle.sh | ticket CLI overhead (needs 78fc-3858) |
| ~7s | test-suggestion-record.sh | 12 ticket system inits |
| ~7s | test-ticket-archived-exclusion-e2e.sh | ticket CLI overhead (needs 78fc-3858) |
| ~7s | test-ticket-deps.sh | ticket CLI overhead (needs 78fc-3858) |
| ~7s | test-ticket-list-transition-comment-e2e.sh | ticket CLI overhead |
| ~6s | test-project-detect.sh | 127 subprocess invocations (detection tests) |
| ~6s | test-validate-sigurg-handler.sh | intentional 3s kill timer |
| ~6s | test-ticket-compact.sh | ticket CLI overhead (needs 78fc-3858) |
| ~6s | test-ticket-e2e.sh | ticket CLI overhead |
| ~6s | test-ticket-show.sh | ticket CLI overhead (needs 78fc-3858) |
| ~6s | test-emit-review-event.sh | ticket system init per test |
| ~6s | test-ticket-init.sh | tests ticket init behavior (cannot use fixture) |
| ~6s | test-isolation-check.sh | needs investigation |
| ~6s | test-ticket-comment.sh | ticket CLI overhead (needs 78fc-3858) |
| ~5s | test-validate-e2e-missing-target.sh | runs validate.sh |
| ~5s | test-cleanup-claude-session.sh | process management with sleeps |
| ~5s | test-compact-sync-precondition.sh | ticket CLI overhead |
| ~5s | test-validate-shim-refs-integration.sh | runs validate.sh |

### Key Insight
18 of the remaining slow tests are bottlenecked by ticket CLI subprocess overhead (~0.3-0.5s per invocation). Epic 78fc-3858 (sourceable ticket-lib API) would address all of them.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 3 (INTERMEDIATE). 45 tests exceed 5s threshold — compound performance bug across test suite.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Investigation findings: Each ticket operation takes ~440ms (python3 flock + realpath ~50ms, git add ~30ms, git commit ~200ms, bash overhead ~160ms). Transition test: 20 repos × 0.45s + 57 ops × 0.44s = 34s theoretical (26.6s actual with overlap). Key optimizations: (1) replace python3 realpath with cd+pwd -P (~30ms saved/op), (2) cache gc.auto=0 once per repo instead of per-op (~10ms saved/op), (3) reduce test-test-batched.sh sleeps (~8s).
comments.author: Test
